name: Yaitabashi Sou
description:
Sou Yaitabashi (Non-Killing Game AU)

Sou Yaitabashi (矢板橋 聡) is a student participating in the Session Two killing game featured in Tetro Danganronpa: BLUE. His title is the Ultimate Terrarium Artist. Within the session, he is designated as Student Eight.
creator: Kotonoha Kagayaki
